label.style: color: #d1fae5; font-size: 0.8rem; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 5px;

div.style: flex: 1; text-align: center; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 10px; padding: 15px; background: white;
flex: 1; text-align: center; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 10px; padding: 15px; background: white;
flex: 1; text-align: center; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 10px; padding: 15px; background: white;
